selection_policy.official_anchor: Use the run that best balances undefeated or strongest match record with high score and low captures for the stored seed set. Do not blindly trust the harness auto-best file when it prefers score diff over capture quality.
selection_policy.latest_broader_sample: Keep the newest wider-seed benchmark summary for each tracked opponent so regression and volatility can be seen beyond the official anchor seed set.

notes: Promoted from the rollout-scoring refinement that values safe local pellet potential and realized score slightly more strongly inside MonteCarlo playouts.
Replaces the old NeuralNet anchor because it kept the 5-0 record, raised average score substantially, and still held captures to 0.4.
Promoted from the validated worktree change that stops hard-short-circuiting directly into post-capture escape.
Higher score and fewer captures than the prior 5-0 StaticHeuro anchor, so this is now the official score/capture reference.
Latest headless official rerun collected in this automation lane on top of commit 2ee995d after restoring the MonteCarlo service back to clean HEAD content.
The current NeuralNetBot lane has regressed sharply to 2-3, with losses on seeds 103-105 and a negative average score diff, so the official 5-0 NeuralNet anchor remains unchanged.
Latest headless official rerun collected in this automation lane on top of commit 2ee995d after restoring the MonteCarlo service back to clean HEAD content.
The current StaticHeuro lane sits at 3-2 with materially worse capture quality than the stored 5-0 / 0.4-capture anchor, so the official StaticHeuro anchor remains unchanged.
Latest broader sample in this automation lane, combined from the official 101-105 validation and the 106-110 extension rerun on top of commit 5c1776c.
The combined 101-110 record is only 5-5 because seeds 101, 102, 106, 109, and 110 still lose to NeuralNetBot; keep this as a rerun summary, not as evidence of a persisted new source branch.
Latest broader sample in this automation lane, combined from the official 101-105 validation and the 106-110 extension rerun on top of commit 5c1776c.
The rerun stays strongly broad-positive against StaticHeuro at 9-1 while cutting average captures to 0.1; only seed 101 still loses, by score.
